info.english_meaning: to kill to cause pain to torment to irritate
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: ' lumbayed tumbayedarde Sapi lumbati tumbati ' (Slo. 139) iti devaH  kzIrataraNgiRyAm ' ardane ' ityuktam  devamEtreyO ' ardane ' ityeva paWataH  ' curAdipAWAdeva iditkaraRAt lumbayati - lumbati iti sidDeH ardanerTe BvAdO pAWosya vyarTaH syAt  iha (curAdO) adarSanarTe tu arTaBedAt sopi (BvAdO pAWa:) sArTakaH syAt  ata eva ' adarSane ' ityeva samaYjasamiti BAti ' iti kfdantarUpamAlA

participles.neuter: lulumbizAmbaBUvat, lulumbizAmbaBUvad, lulumbizAmAsivat, lulumbizAmAsivad, lulumbizAYcakfvat, lulumbizAYcakfvad
lumbayAmbaBUvat, lumbayAmbaBUvad, lumbayAmAsivat, lumbayAmAsivad, lumbayAYcakfvat, lumbayAYcakfvad
lolumbAmbaBUvat, lolumbAmbaBUvad, lolumbAmAsivat, lolumbAmAsivad, lolumbAYcakfvat, lolumbAYcakfvad
